ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a query in Neo4j?'})-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 123})-[:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'The correct way is...'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How has the question about optimizing Neo4j query performance been structured, and what specific Cypher techniques are the top-scoring answers emphasizing?

cypher: MATCH (q:Question {title: 'Optimizing Neo4j Query Performance'})<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment)<-[:COMMENTED]-(u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q)\nRETURN q.title AS question_title, q.body_markdown AS question_body, collect(c.score) AS comment_scores, collect(c.uuid) AS comment_uuids
